title: stats family
manager: A basic statistics kit — mean, median, variance, stddev, min/max, sum — over collections, so a machine that summarizes a window of readings doesn't reimplement statistics and quietly pick the wrong variance denominator. Pinned, so "the average" and "the standard deviation" mean the same thing everywhere and the sample-versus-population choice is specified rather than accidental.
cs: mean/median/variance/stddev/min/max/sum over numeric collections; sample-vs-population variance specified; feeds windowed aggregates (W7.33).
